name: You are a Feared Mage RPG
description:
In the year 2024, magic became real on Earth. At first, the world was enthralled by this revelation, expecting that magic would lead to miracles, progress, and a golden age. The emergence of magic sparked excitement and hope, with people imagining wonders like instant cures for disease, free energy, and the resolution of global problems.

But the dream of a better world soon gave way to a nightmare, as the true nature of humanity revealed itself. The small percentage of people who gained magical powers became unstoppable. Any who opposed them were punished or killed. A new world order is now beginning.

lucky for you, you just woke up as a mage.
creator: Mason8tor
